hero.title: Amaphrojekthi okufinyeleleka komphakathi
hero.lead: Lolu hlu lubhala amaphrojekthi omphakathi aphethwe nge-IATF. Amaphrojecthi okufinyeleleka amukelwe, ingqalasizinda yesayithi, kanye nama-prototypes agciniwe agcinwa ebonakalayo lapha.

intro: Amaphrojekthi amukelwe abhalwe lapha uma eseshicilelwe.

header.title: Ukuguqula isidingo esiqondile sokufinyeleleka sibe iphrojekthi yomphakathi

paragraphs: I-IATF ibukeza izidingo eziqondile zokufinyeleleka ezingaguqulwa zibe umsebenzi womthombo ovulekile womphakathi owusizo.

emptyState.title: Azikho amaphrojekthi ashicilelwe okwamanje
paragraphs: I-IATF ilungiselela iqoqo layo lokuqala lamaphrojekthi omphakathi.
Usengathumela isicelo uma unesidingo esiqondile sokufinyeleleka.
